hooks.statusMessage: Running backend tests before PR creation...
hooks.command: cd /home/user/RENTTRACK/backend && python -m pytest apps/ -q --tb=short 2>&1; BACKEND_EXIT=$?; cd /home/user/RENTTRACK/frontend && npm run typecheck 2>&1; FE_EXIT=$?; if [ $BACKEND_EXIT -ne 0 ] || [ $FE_EXIT -ne 0 ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Tests or type-check failed. Run /test-backend and /test-frontend to see details, fix failures, then retry creating the PR."}'; exit 2; fi; echo '{"decision":"allow"}'
